'''鈭歾-h-f''' ('''kazahaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lynch|lynch]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-h-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lynch|lynch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-h-f
|-
! Lemma
| kazahaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizahaf|thizahaf]] || [[word:jizahaf|jizahaf]] || [[word:shizahaf|shizahaf]] || [[word:kizahaf|kizahaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzahaf|thuthuzahaf]] || [[word:jujuzahaf|jujuzahaf]] || [[word:shushuzahaf|shushuzahaf]] || [[word:kukuzahaf|kukuzahaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzahaf|thuzahaf]] || [[word:juzahaf|juzahaf]] || [[word:shuzahaf|shuzahaf]] || [[word:kuzahaf|kuzahaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzahaf|thuzahaf]] || [[word:juzahaf|juzahaf]] || [[word:shuzahaf|shuzahaf]] || [[word:kuzahaf|kuzahaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezahaf|thezahaf]] || [[word:jezahaf|jezahaf]] || [[word:shezahaf|shezahaf]] || [[word:kezahaf|kezahaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozahaf|thothozahaf]] || [[word:jojozahaf|jojozahaf]] || [[word:shoshozahaf|shoshozahaf]] || [[word:kokozahaf|kokozahaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozahaf|thozahaf]] || [[word:jozahaf|jozahaf]] || [[word:shozahaf|shozahaf]] || [[word:kozahaf|kozahaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozahaf|thozahaf]] || [[word:jozahaf|jozahaf]] || [[word:shozahaf|shozahaf]] || [[word:kozahaf|kozahaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zahaf|th忙zahaf]] || [[word:j忙zahaf|j忙zahaf]] || [[word:sh忙zahaf|sh忙zahaf]] || [[word:k忙zahaf|k忙zahaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazahaf|thathazahaf]] || [[word:jajazahaf|jajazahaf]] || [[word:shashazahaf|shashazahaf]] || [[word:kakazahaf|kakazahaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazahaf|thazahaf]] || [[word:jazahaf|jazahaf]] || [[word:shazahaf|shazahaf]] || [[word:kazahaf|kazahaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazahaf|thazahaf]] || [[word:jazahaf|jazahaf]] || [[word:shazahaf|shazahaf]] || [[word:kazahaf|kazahaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazahaf|shazahaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazahaf|goshazahaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazahaf|gokishazahaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazahafn眉|shazahafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazahafnkn眉|goshazahafnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahafn眉|gokishazahafn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazahafsh毛|shazahafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazahafnksh毛|goshazahafnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazahafsh毛|gokishazahafsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahafro|shazahafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahafnkro|goshazahafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahafro|gokishazahafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahafmu|shazahafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahafnkmu|goshazahafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahafmu|gokishazahafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazahafsher|shazahafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazahafnksher|goshazahafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazahafsher|gokishazahafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazahafng|shazahafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazahafnkng|goshazahafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazahafng|gokishazahafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazahafya|shazahafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazahafnkya|goshazahafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazahafya|gokishazahafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazahafyam|shazahafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazahafnkyam|goshazahafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazahafyam|gokishazahafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahafn眉sh毛|shazahafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahafnkn眉sh毛|goshazahafnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahafn眉sh毛|gokishazahafn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahafn眉ro|shazahafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahafnkn眉ro|goshazahafnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahafn眉ro|gokishazahafn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahafn眉mu|shazahafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahafnkn眉mu|goshazahafnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahafn眉mu|gokishazahafn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahafsh毛n眉|shazahafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahafnksh毛n眉|goshazahafnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahafsh毛n眉|gokishazahafsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahafsh毛ro|shazahafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahafnksh毛ro|goshazahafnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahafsh毛ro|gokishazahafsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahafsh毛mu|shazahafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahafnksh毛mu|goshazahafnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahafsh毛mu|gokishazahafsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahafron眉|shazahafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahafnkron眉|goshazahafnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahafron眉|gokishazahafron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahafrosh毛|shazahafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahafnkrosh毛|goshazahafnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahafrosh毛|gokishazahafrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazahafromu|shazahafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazahafnkromu|goshazahafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazahafromu|gokishazahafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazahafmun眉|shazahafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazahafnkmun眉|goshazahafnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazahafmun眉|gokishazahafmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazahafmush毛|shazahafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazahafnkmush毛|goshazahafnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazahafmush毛|gokishazahafmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazahafmuro|shazahafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazahafnkmuro|goshazahafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazahafmuro|gokishazahafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
